Co-own Vacation Homes On The Blockchain

Everlodge is disrupting the vacation home industry, by introducing the worlds first co-ownership platform on the blockchain.

Buy Everlodge Connect WalletClaimRectification

Featured in

The Smart Way to Own Vacation Homes

NO BANKS, CREDIT CHECKS OR HIDDEN FEES

Everlodge provides you with a seamless approach to fractional investing in vacation rentals, eliminating the complexities associated with traditional real estate investment. Our innovative platform revolutionizes the way people invest in second homes.

This is where Airbnb meets Web3!

Everlodge Vision

Everlodge Vision

For decades, the real estate and vacation home market has predominantly been an investment avenue only for the affluent. With Everlodge now, you too can build your wealth just like the world's top 1%.

Get Passive Income

Start building your real estate empire from as little as $100 and generate passive income from vacation rentals in your favorite holiday destinations.

How it works?

Start building your real estate empire by following these three simple steps:

Register

Register and connect your DeFi wallet to your Everlodge account in minutes.

Browse Our Platform

Browse through our listings of hotels, luxury villas and vacation homes around the world.

Buy Your Vacation Home

Purchase your first vacation home from as little as $100 and start generating a income.

Ecosystem

Everlodge Ecosystem

Buy Everlodge

Build Equity And Not Just Memories

Why waste time and money on hotels and holiday rentals when you could join the Everlodge ecosystem.

Growth & Income

Everlodge empowers you to generate a monthly income from co-owned properties while also enjoying the advantages of value appreciation.

Dream Locations

We offer properties in some of the most sought-after destinations in the world, looking for a chalet in the Alps? or a villa in Turks and Caicos? we got you covered.

Read the Everlodge Whitepaper

We are democratizing vacation home ownership by combining the best elements of real estate investing with Web3 technology. Download and read through our whitepaper which explains the Everlodge vision.

Features of Everlodge Token

Those who become early adopters of the project will be rewarded with a genuine utility token specially designed to incentivize and benefit our community and investors.

Passive Income

By staking Everlodge tokens, token holders have the opportunity to generate a passive income.

Rewards

Gain access to exclusive monthly rewards, including exciting holiday giveaways and cash prizes.

Membership

The purchase of presale tokens automatically grants eligibility for our exclusive Everlodge private members club.

Discounts

Token holders can leverage their tokens to enjoy discounts on trading fees and purchases within the Everlodge ecosystem.

Roadmap

Start public presale and launch social communities.

Complete smart contract audit and team KYC.

Stage 1

Stage 1 marketing and PR push.

Complete UX/UI for Desktop, Android and IOS applications.

List on Uniswap and lock liquidity pool.

CG and CMC listings, launch influencer marketing campaigns.

Confirm Listing on centralized exchange (CEX).

Release Everlodge Platform (Beta) version.

Partner with hotel groups and renowned developers.

Stage 2

Stage 2 viral marketing campaign, influencer outreach.

Full launch of live platform, onboard 50,000 users.

Implement the Everlodge VIP tier system.

Run first Everlodge luxury home giveaway.

Implement lending protocol 2.

Target $1bn in AUM across 1,000+ homes.

Frequently Asked Questions

$ELDG is a utility token that powers the Everlodge ecosystem. The token is built on the Ethereum blockchain and is the official currency inside the Everlodge ecosystem.

The official contract address for ELDG is: 0xDDA31D354a519ecfB0bC2a536b5E7be147C0F7F4. You can view the verified contract address on Etherscan

You will receive your tokens at the end of the Everlodge Presale, these tokens will be available to claim from your dashboard.

Yes, we have undergone a smart contract audit with a blockchain security firm InterFi.

There will be a total of 11 stages to the presale, in each stage of the presale there will be multiple price increases.

Build your real estate portfolio in minutes
